title: BEM-860 mailbox check
objective: Check file governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md. If it contains one final status APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON, create governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESULT.md with that status and evidence. If it is missing or still pending, create/update governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_LAST_CHECK.md with status WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE and timestamp. Do not write issue #31. No issue comments.
